description: Politics Track icon improvements: Replace the star icon for Kami phase with a more thematic icon (torii gate or similar spiritual icon), replace the tea ceremony icon with a more elegant teapot design, replace the war phase icon with a more aggressive/visual icon (crossed swords or war banner). Also add a missing Kami phase icon at the END of the politics track (after mandate slot 7 and before the War icon) since kami resolution happens there too but is not visually indicated.
steps: In src/components/PoliticsTrack.tsx, replace the SVG star path in renderKamiIcon() with a more appropriate kami/spiritual icon (e.g., a torii gate miniature, a spirit flame, or a prayer bell shape) that is clear at 20x20 px
In src/components/PoliticsTrack.tsx, replace the tea ceremony SVG icon (the simple cup/steam lines) with a more elegant and visually clear teapot design
In src/components/PoliticsTrack.tsx, replace the war phase SVG icon (currently a flag/banner) with a more aggressive war icon (crossed swords, battle axe, or war drums) that reads well at 18x18 px
In the PoliticsTrack return JSX, add a third renderKamiIcon('kami-3') AFTER renderSlot(6) and BEFORE the war phase icon div, since kami resolution happens after all 7 mandates complete
acceptance_criteria: The politics track shows a thematic kami icon (not a star) between mandate groups
The tea ceremony icon is a visually elegant teapot
The war phase icon is aggressive and war-themed (not a flag)
A third kami icon appears after mandate slot 7 and before the war icon
findings: All four icon changes implemented successfully. Torii gate for kami, kyusu teapot for tea ceremony, crossed katanas for war, and third kami icon added after slot 6. Build passes cleanly.
